seoTitle: Garland ISD Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Garland ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 22 last day, fall break, holidays, breaks, early dismissal, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Garland ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 and lists May 22, 2026 as the last day of class with high-school-only early dismissal. Fall Break runs October 13-17, Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The calendar lists 83 days in the first semester and 91 days in the second semester.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Garland ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Fall Break in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall Break runs Monday, October 13 through Friday, October 17, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Garland ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of class is Friday, May 22, 2026, with high-school-only early dismissal.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists 83 first-semester days and 91 second-semester days.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Garland ISD schedules a full week of Fall Break before the second grading period begins.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissal
yearNumbers.detail: May 21 and May 22 are listed as high-school-only early dismissal dates.

events.name: Last Day of Class/Early Dismissal - High School Only
